title: Iran releases U.S. citizen in goodwill gesture, Trump says
summary_full: Dena Karari had been held in Iran since December 2024, her attorney said. Several other Americans are believed to still be in Iranian custody.
summary_public: Dena Karari had been held in Iran since December 2024, her attorney said. Several other Americans are believed to still be in Iranian custody.

IR.label: neutral
